title: Acid asteroid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Acid_asteroid.jpg|thumb|right|250px|An acid asteroid in the Dantooine system]]
An '''acid asteroid''' was an unusual [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] that was made up of [[Acid/Legends|acidic]] compounds. These compounds were hard and dangerous to [[Mining/Legends|mine]].

The [[Dantooine system/Legends|Dantooine system]] contained acid asteroids.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
